Package game.item.weapon

Interface WeaponSkill

All Known Implementing Classes:
BroadSwordFocusSkill, GiantHammerGreatSlam, GreatKnifeStepAndStabSkill
public interface WeaponSkill
Class representing the WeaponSkill interface. Created by:

  • Method Summary

    Activate the skill

  • Method Details

    • getActiveState

      boolean getActiveState()
      Return the active or non-active status
      Returns:
      the status true or false

    • activate

      double activate​(WeaponItem weaponItem, int max, int current)
      Activate the skill
      Parameters:
      weaponItem - active weapon
      current - : Current status
      max - : Maximum status

    • deactivate

      void deactivate​(WeaponItem weaponItem)
      Activate the skill
      Parameters:
      weaponItem - non-active weapon

    • tick

      void tick​(WeaponItem weaponItem)
      count the turn
      Parameters:
      weaponItem - non-active weapon

    • toString

      java.lang.String toString()
      Return the string on console
      Overrides:
      toString in class java.lang.Object
      Returns:
      the string of the skills
